programme.desc: Part two of three. Marie and Debras feud continues, so Ray and Frank use it to their advantage, while Robert tries to get the warring pair to make friends. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra accuses Ray of still not being able to read her moods, prompting them to reminisce fondly about the first night they spent together. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A message mistakenly left on an answering machine leads to a possible romance for Frasier, who rushes off to the airport to meet the caller. Guest starring Linda Hamilton, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A cancelled date leaves Niles, Martin and Daphne suspecting Frasiers supermodel escort is just a figment of his fevered imagination - so he tries to provide photographic evidence of the relationship. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier go gift-shopping with a vengeance as Martins 65th birthday approaches, vying with each other to be the apple of their fathers eye on his big day. Starring John Mahoney, Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Niles throws a fancy-dress Halloween party with a literary theme as a benefit for the Library Association, which he attends dressed as Cyrano de Bergerac, while a misunderstanding lets one or two skeletons out of the closet. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe tries to buy a set of art deco cigarette machines, and one of his and Frank Fritzs recent purchases leaves an appraiser speechless

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Dorset to pick up a Ford Escort MK2 RS2000, which belongs to carpenter Mike. After his son was involved in a horrific road accident, Mike gave up work and supported him through a four-year recovery. Now, Mikes family want to give something back to offer thanks to such a devoted father by presenting him with his fully restored RS2000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Simon OBrien are in Woking, Surrey, where they find a sidecar - to be transformed into a boat - and a water cylinder that Simon might make into a trendy lamp

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman joins the team as Clare Balding presents live coverage of Crufts 2026 from the National Exhibition Centre. The action gets off to a flying start with all the thrills and speed of Flyball, as reporter Radzi Chinyanganya and commentators Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge call the live heats. Plus: Claudia Winkleman gives her first impressions of the worlds greatest dog show, and special guest Ellie Simmonds returns to her home patch in Birmingham for canine chat

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, renovation plans give restaurateurs Andrew and Richard sleepless nights, while poor weather hits BandB hosts Janey and Sharon, who are hoping to launch a new cookery school in Corrèze. In Spain, things get too quiet at Abi and Darrens silent disco on the Costa Blanca, and Gordon and Shonas Marbella dream hangs in the balance

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Helen and Carls self-catering glampsite, Peacock Lake, in Nottinghamshire. The hosts feedback has ruffled plenty of feathers throughout the week, so their guests expectations are sky-high, and lavatory letdowns and smelly bedding dont make for happy glampers

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth to host in south Wales is childrens doctor Sophie, who despite usually being a vegan has decided to cook meat for her guests in an attempt to grab the grand. Sophies night is full of surprises as she reveals a number of hidden talents. Claire is flabbergasted at her job, Richard is shocked at where she went to university, and Sandra thinks she can give her a run for her money at her hidden hobby. The night isnt without incident as Sophies inexperience at cooking meat comes back to bite her and makes Daffyd uncomfortable

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander is in Lower Normandy in France with Tracy and Lee from Greater Manchester, who run a dog walking business together. The couple have a budget of £70,000 to buy a holiday property that could one day become their permanent home. Lucy hunts out five properties for the pair to consider

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Clare Balding presents all the live action as Crufts 2026 gets into full swing. And Claudia Winkleman hustles the bustle of the Birmingham NEC halls for the best features at the worlds greatest dog show. The Working Group is the first to be judged, with the winner going through to Sundays prestigious Best in Show final. This group includes guard dogs, and search and rescue breeds like Dobermanns, Rottweilers and Newfoundlands. Then its time for the Pastoral Group to take centre stage. Australian shepherds have been the most successful breed in this group in recent years. And if that wasnt enough excitement, athleticism and speed are the order of the day in the Agility and Flyball competitions, with commentary from Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge

programme.title: Molly vs the Machines
programme.desc: Documentary about the death of Molly Russell, the 14-year-old who in 2017 took her own life as a result of depression and negative social media content, and her father Ians fight for online safety. The film focuses on what happened to Molly in the lead-up to her tragic death and the broader economic logic behind AI and big tech as it continues to shape, influence and infiltrate peoples lives

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics views on Britains Got Talent, The Heat, 56 Days, Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, Ed Staffords Rite Of Passage, Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time, BBC News (Andrew Arrested) and ITV News (Mandelson Arrested)

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: The team attend a man who has slipped while crossing a stream and is left with a bone sticking out of his arm. In Wasdale, an emergency call has come in for a man with a badly broken leg on the Corridor Route to Scafell Pike. Darkness is closing in, and the first challenge is to locate the casualty. Leaving him on the hill in plummeting temperatures would be life-threatening

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey to transform Maxs Bar and Grill. Even though its been serving up famous hotdogs for almost 100 years, its on the verge of crumbling, with over $1million of debt. The situation isnt helped by a power struggle between the divorced owners, who still work together

programme.title: French Exit (2020)
programme.desc: Frances Price, an ageing Manhattan socialite, cashes in the last of her possessions and resolves to live out her twilight days anonymously in a borrowed apartment in Paris, accompanied by her directionless son Malcolm and a cat named Small Frank. Comedy drama, starring Michelle Pfeiffer, Lucas Hedges and Valerie Mahaffey, with the voice of Tracy Letts

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Dumfries to meet Maggie, whose farm holds an extraordinary collection of memorabilia

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Now that permission has been granted, Keith and Marj start work in the main chapel hall, removing the pews, parquet floor and large pulpit. Keith visits a fellow potter, and Marj makes a discovery in the once-pigeon-infested Sunday school ceiling vents

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Siobhán McSweeney hosts the semi-final, where the four remaining potters make wall-mounted water fountains inspired by Romes Trevi Fountain and take on guest judge and ceramic artist Cleo Mussis surprise mosaic challenge. Whose fountain will make a splash and see them through to the final, and whose mosaic will leave them picking up the pieces?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Dont Shoot, Im Only the Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Sam foolishly allows Woody to cut his hair, and Frasier brings the members of his therapy group for those with low self-esteem to the bar, in the hope they can meet normal people. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody has to take a second job as a gravedigger to pay for Kellys engagement ring and soon finds himself hallucinating due to lack of sleep. Starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla opposes her sons decision to become a priest, Sam finds a way to get even with John Hill, and Cliff begins a new life as a stand-up comedian. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Eccentric cousin Gerard persuades Robert to join a cult known as the Inner Path, which claims to teach its members how to attain peace and achieve their full potential. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra learns two of her friends have been to see a marriage counsellor, and tries to convince Ray they should seek professional advice to resolve their relationship problems. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Allys teacher overhears Ray commenting about the childrens excessive workload, she invites him to address the curriculum review board and gives him a mountain of material for review and evaluation. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Roz panics at the thought of becoming a mother, prompting Frasier to lend her a friendly shoulder to cry on - while he ponders the fathers identity. Award-winning comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Special episode filmed on location in Seattle. Frasier is guest of honour at a public rally to mark his 1,000th radio show - but the celebrations go awry as Niless jealousy reaches new peaks. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink is asked to be a guest speaker on an all-star cruise, and invites the family to accompany him. However, the so-called celebrities also appearing are not exactly famous. Meanwhile, Niless marital problems worsen once he discovers Maris will also be coming along

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio psychiatrist begins dating a successful lawyer, but it is not long before conflicting career demands start to get in the way of their relationship

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz find a huge sculpture of Elvis and trawl through a trailer full of rare art and military memorabilia

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Loughborough, Leicestershire, to take on a 1992 Saab 900 Turbo thats in desperate need of repair. The car belongs to Saab enthusiast and former electrical engineer Pravesh. Sadly, due to ill health, Pravesh has been left with little strength to work on the car, so its been left to rot. His family believe getting his Saab back on the road would give him the boost he needs

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Herefordshire to meet former farmer Julian. Henry finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, while Simon hatches plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with comedian Neil Delamere joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman joins Clare Balding for more live coverage from the National Exhibition Centre, as dog owners from across the globe descend on Birmingham. This year, the Flyball is wide open with the reigning Belgian champions Road Runners Beep Beep not competing. Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge commentate on todays heats, while Radzi Chinyanganya captures all the emotion from the Main Arena. Plus: the latest from the NEC halls with Claudia Winkleman

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The season winds down for the Brits abroad, but theyre gearing up for the biggest days of their lives. Its hoped that Abi and Darrens wedding in Spain and Andrew and Richards wedding event in France will go off without a hitch. Friends Janey and Sharon also have plenty to celebrate at their BandB - but success comes at a cost

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: With cleanliness being the buzz word of the week, almost all of the hosts are unhappy about their less-than sparkling scores and theres suspicions that some of the hoteliers have been playing dirty

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Civil servant Sandra hosts the final night in south Wales. After a week of culinary highs and lows, Sandras planning a menu thats heavy on cream and mushrooms - a risky move since her guests have made it very clear throughout the week that these two ingredients are not much-loved. With a new twist shaking things up during dessert, its a dramatic end to a lively week

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Live coverage of the spectacular Opening Ceremony of the Milano Cortina 2026 Paralympic Winter Games from the Arena di Verona. This beautiful Roman amphitheatre is the first UNESCO World Heritage Site to be used in a Paralympic Ceremony. In the studio, Channel 4s presenting team of Ade Adepitan, Billy Monger, Ed Jackson, Dame Sarah Storey and Alice Tai preview the next nine days of elite sporting competition, highlighting the key athletes to watch out for and ParalympicsGBs main medal hopes. Among those athletes are curler Jo Butterfield, who is aiming to become the first British athlete to win at both the Summer and Winter Games, and Neil Simpson, wholl be wanting to defend his super-G title

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Nick Mohammed, Vittorio Angelone and Penny Mordaunt for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert: The Book of John
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the comedian filmed live at the Wales Millennium Centre in Cardiff, which was his first live show in six years. Raw, personal and brutally honest like never before, Rhod takes us on a no-nonsense journey into finding humour when youve hit rock bottom - and the unexpected encounter that leads you to a lower place

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Cosmic Jam
programme.desc: In his classic debut live stand-up show, filmed at Londons Bloomsbury Theatre in 1996, Bill explains why Bryan Adams is perhaps the greatest ever exponent of the rock anthem; demonstrates the influence that Cockney music has had on the great classical composers; and warns of the perils of a world ruled by insects, while playing the second-biggest gong in Britain

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Long Island, New York, to help an Indian restaurant which used to run a Mexican eatery out of the same kitchen. Its been operating for 35-years, but a decline in business led to fusion experiments, which havent always been successful and which have confused the customers. With some dishes tasting soggy and swimming with oil, Ramsay has his work cut out trying to turn things round

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another selection of BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The contest begins at Knockaloe Beg Farm on the Isle of Man, where owners Fiona and John Anderson hope their guests will embrace their green ethos. They kick things off with an afternoon of laser mayhem, and continue the fun the next day by following breakfast with hands-on animal antics

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests head to the Arches on the Isle of Man for their second stay, where owner Phil Routledge hopes to wow them with scenic views and scuba diving at the BandBs own pool. However, some of the owners are dismayed by modern gadgets with a lack of instructions, and even find cobwebs in their rooms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants arrive at the Trafford in Blackpool, owned by Robbie and John Welling, who are proud of their traditional bucket and spade BandB. The guests are pleasantly surprised, even if previous host Phil is intent on finding dust as a bit of tit-for-tat retaliation, and the afternoon is spent learning the art of making sticks of rock

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Host Julie welcomes the contestants to Sheepy Lodge, Warwickshire, where they are shocked by their surroundings, and disappointed by a variety of things in the rooms. The host puts on some old-fashioned parlour games, before a fierce hide-and-seek contest erupts. At breakfast, Julie frets when she must prepare poached eggs, and is left emotional after the feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival BandB owners meet to settle some scores and discover what they have been paid. Knockaloe Beg Farm owners Fiona and John Anderson tackle criticisms of a missing host at breakfast, and Phil Routledge from The Arches on the Isle of Man takes on Robbie and John Welling from The Trafford in Blackpool about their forensic investigation. After some heated discussion, the winner is announced

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Series one favourite Rajan hopes it will be fourth time lucky as he tries to impress Corinne who has a history of meeting all the wrong men, and Shakira is on her first ever first date and she shakes like a leaf waiting to meet an equally nervy Xany. Also, party animal Devon meets teetotal Will, talkative Londoner Purdey likes laid-back Aussie Matts well-toned arms, Dan berates his date Angela for liking all sorts of music and gentlemanly pensioner John hopes to find understanding and empathy with Jean

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sarah from Plymouth becomes the first returning picker having previously been on the show as David. Now proudly pansexual and living as a woman, Sarah cant wait to road test her new body and hopes her first date as a woman will be everything she has dreamed of. Twenty year-old plumber Jamie from Swansea is fed up with being hit on by OAPs at work, he comes into the studio looking for love

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The regular gaggle of family and friends share their thoughts on shows including Im a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown, Family Fortunes, Mammals, Love Is Blind and This Morning

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, Im a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Wont Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members head to the annual Tri-State Cop-Con event, which is usually their excuse for a big party. However, their fun is threatened when Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy vanishes shortly before she is due to take her sergeants exam, leaving Jake and Rosa with just a few hours to find her and bring her back to sit the test before it is too late. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Furnero

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After getting telephone answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another, so Erica, Barry and Pops try to reunite them at a hockey game

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to be a horror writer, but his efforts get him grounded on Halloween when Beverly discovers that she is the basis for the monster in his story. Erica forces Barry to attend a costume dance with her

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Kev, his ex-paratrooper best man Sam, bride Trish and her best friend Charlene join together to relive one of the most turbulent weddings in the shows history

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Phil arent convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own as they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. Meanwhile, Pameron gets out of prison early and has a bone to pick with Mitchell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before they become grandparents, while Dylan introduces them to his mother, who has an interesting past. Meanwhile, Cameron and Mitchell discover some interesting reading material in Lilys room and decide to confront her about it, and Gloria and Jay find out their respective great uncles may have fought on opposing sides of a war

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzos. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Ritas. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a years worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adams girlfriend Jackie returns after spending the summer in New York and seems like a different person. After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Laineys domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica thinks that all her singing dreams are about to come true when she lands a job at the new karaoke bar in town. However, when she is tasked with bringing in more customers, she is forced to ask Beverly for help. Meanwhile, Murray tries to teach Barry and Lainey how to be financially responsible adults. Rick Springfield guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley and Dylans plan to quietly elope before the babies are born doesnt go as smoothly as they had hoped. Meanwhile, Jay continues to try to get his new business off the ground by courting an Instagram celebrity

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam finally gets a chance to shine when he is asked to preside over the high-school graduation ceremony at the last minute, while Jay gives the commencement address

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Holt find the motivation to help Captain CJ with a big case that is proving problematic. Jeffords imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. Diaz and Boyle take a break from the night shift to visit a foot massage parlour

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle enlists Peraltas help in tracking down his sons favourite toy for Christmas, but they find themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian crime ring as a result. Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his sons new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A snowstorm leaves Bart, Lisa and their fellow students trapped inside Springfield Elementary and it is not long before the pupils are running amok. Homer and Ned Flanders are left to mount the rescue operation to save the kids - and Principal Skinner

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff team up to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery that Lainey has left town. Adams dread of gym class is amplified when Coach Mellors brother, Coach Nick, arrives and uses fear as a motivator. Meanwhile, Coach Mellor prepares for the next stage in his career

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides their street needs another stop sign and pleads her case to the city comptroller. Barry panics when he realises hes neglected his college applications, while Erica struggles with her career choice

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie join host Anna Richardson and feature as the first picker pair as they search for another woman to join their relationship. Plus 41 year-old actor and glamour puss Chrissie from Leeds is hoping to find husband number four

programme.desc: Adrian Perkins, the mayor of Shreveport, Louisiana, is in charge of 3,000 employees serving its 200,000 residents. Louisianas third largest city has fallen on hard times with crime and unemployment on the rise. Mayor Perkins wants to change the fortunes of his home town and he thinks going undercover will help. As his alter ego Wayne Oliver, an unemployed steel worker looking for a new career, he works alongside a firefighter, a police officer and a parks maintenance worker to see what life is like working for the city, and gets the chance to meet his community without them knowing that theyre talking to the mayor

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

On day two, married couple Claire and Gerry host a more traditional evening, but the starter is Megans worst fear - salmon. Nicola and Megan make a discovery in the bedroom that leads to a shocking revelation. On the final night, Megan and Sean host a Greek-themed evening, but their confusing menu has their guests guessing. Megan could be her own worst enemy when she fails to bite her tongue after her starter is criticised

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

On the last night, John and Katy aim to spread the love among the group by serving up the same menu that they had for their wedding six weeks earlier, while John wears his wedding suit and Katy wears half her wedding dress

He poses as a contestant on a fake reality TV show, and tries learn more about the people working for his company, which has been in his family for four generations since its founding by his great-grandfather in 1889

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Kat Cole goes undercover among the workforce of her company Cinnabon Incorporated, which serves sweet treats from more than 900 bakeries in 40 countries worldwide. Kat has come a long way after being raised by a single mother who fed her family of three girls on $10 a week. She seeks advice from her old boss, former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks, who also went undercover, in his own organisation. Kat has some lofty goals for Cinnabon to become a worldwide food brand, and wants to make sure that the new products she has put in place are working before she implements her plans

On the last night, retired businessmen Adrian and Marks well thought-out menu and unusual entertainment bring everything to a lively conclusion

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series as the property brothers work more makeover magic. Will helping their homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? And will Drew find a home that will make frugal Rob splash the cash? Short:Rob and Julies design choices have lowered the value of their cosy lakeside home. Can Jonathan doll up the place? programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former boxing champ and groom-to-be Jordan plans a fight-night wedding in front of thousands of people, but his fiancee Danielle dreams of a girly and intimate wedding day

programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans to push his unadventurous bride Aimee to the extreme with a wedding that would send most brides over the edge. While Aimee wanted to play it safe with a picturesque traditional event, Lee hopes shell take a leap of faith to be his wife

programme.desc: Stephen J Cloobeck, chairman and CEO of hotel company Diamond Resorts International, becomes the first boss to go incognito at his own organisation for a second time. His mission is to rebuild a business that he has just purchased, Pacific Monarch Resorts, which has locations across the western US and Mexico. He disguises himself as an ex-construction worker who wants to open a boutique hotel, going the extra mile by having his ears pierced to complete the look

programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum goes undercover among the workforce of his company PostNet, which offers design, printing and shipping services to small businesses. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isnt treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations hes ever encountered

Now proudly pansexual and living as a woman, Sarah cant wait to road test her new body and hopes her first date as a woman will be everything she has dreamed of. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members head to the annual Tri-State Cop-Con event, which is usually their excuse for a big party. However, their fun is threatened when Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy vanishes shortly before she is due to take her sergeants exam, leaving Jake and Rosa with just a few hours to find her and bring her back to sit the test before it is too late. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Furnero

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After getting telephone answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another, so Erica, Barry and Pops try to reunite them at a hockey game

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to be a horror writer, but his efforts get him grounded on Halloween when Beverly discovers that she is the basis for the monster in his story. Erica forces Barry to attend a costume dance with her

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Groom Kev, his ex-paratrooper best man Sam, bride Trish and her best friend Charlene join together to relive one of the most turbulent weddings in the shows history

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Phil arent convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own as they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. Meanwhile, Pameron gets out of prison early and has a bone to pick with Mitchell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to take a cycling tour through Italy before they become grandparents, while Dylan introduces them to his mother, who has an interesting past. Meanwhile, Cameron and Mitchell discover some interesting reading material in Lilys room and decide to confront her about it, and Gloria and Jay find out their respective great uncles may have fought on opposing sides of a war

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Boca Raton in Florida to turn around the fortunes of Italian restaurant Anna Vincenzos. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Ritas. The owner previously ran a successful catering company but has struggled to adapt her skills to meet the demands of a new business - and with a years worth of food stored in the freezer Gordon realises he has a tough job ahead

programme.title: The Goldbergs

After receiving some bad advice from his loved ones, Adam takes drastic measures to hold on to his relationship. Beverly is not happy with Laineys domestic skills and decides to teach her future daughter-in-law a thing or two about family catering

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica thinks that all her singing dreams are about to come true when she lands a job at the new karaoke bar in town. Rick Springfield guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley and Dylans plan to quietly elope before the babies are born doesnt go as smoothly as they had hoped. Meanwhile, Jay continues to try to get his new business off the ground by courting an Instagram celebrity

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam finally gets a chance to shine when he is asked to preside over the high-school graduation ceremony at the last minute, while Jay gives the commencement address

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Holt find the motivation to help Captain CJ with a big case that is proving problematic. Jeffords imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. Diaz and Boyle take a break from the night shift to visit a foot massage parlour

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle enlists Peraltas help in tracking down his sons favourite toy for Christmas, but they find themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian crime ring as a result. Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his sons new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A snowstorm leaves Bart, Lisa and their fellow students trapped inside Springfield Elementary and it is not long before the pupils are running amok. Homer and Ned Flanders are left to mount the rescue operation to save the kids - and Principal Skinner

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff team up to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery that Lainey has left town. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides their street needs another stop sign and pleads her case to the city comptroller. Barry panics when he realises hes neglected his college applications, while Erica struggles with her career choice

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphy house is bursting at the seams when Dylans hippie mom moves in and Claires lonely stepdad Jerry wants to pay them a visit, too. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria attempt to help Manny get over his big break-up with Sherry

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam tries to keep his big interview a secret, but just ends up making Mitch suspicious. Haley cannot wait for a festive glass of wine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holts mother seeks support from the precinct when her house is burgled. Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom. Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases. Boyle, Jeffords and Gina attempt to resolve a petty conflict between Scully and Hitchcock, while Holt loses Santiagos favourite pen. Guest starring Gina Gershon

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family wins a once-in-a-lifetime safari trip to Africa. However, when Homer enrages a hippo at a Masai party, the jaunt soon becomes an adventure, involving a trip over the Victoria Falls in a ceremonial shield, a carnivorous plant, coconut Molotov cocktails and a chimp refuge thats not all that it seems

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The same day is shown from three different perspectives as Bart is pursued by gangsters, Lisa makes a bid to win the school science fair with a talkative robot, and Marge accidentally slices off Homers thumb. Featuring the guest voices of Frankie Muniz and Joe Mantegna

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge stages a revival of a musical from high school, but her pleasant memories are threatened by the return of an old rival

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Paul Liba hosts a sports-themed night and challenges his guests to eat their pudding while wearing boxing gloves

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas hosts as TV presenter Stacey Dooley, Little Mixs Jade Thirlwall, comedian Katherine Ryan and internet influencer KSI show off their baking skills. They serve up cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies, have their knowledge of pastry tested in the technical and in the showstopper are asked to create a scene showing something they cannot live without - all from biscuit and meringue. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.desc: Reviews of The Traitors, Im a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyres The Wheel, Planet Sex with Cara Delevingne, Mammals, You Wont Believe This and Help! My House Is Haunted

programme.title: First Dates

programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents as 22-year-old Ukrainian refugee Mariia enters the studio. programme.desc: Adam gets between Murray and Marvin when they go without him to the Philadelphia Thanksgiving Day parade to see KITT from TV show Knight Rider. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Despite Beverlys wishes, Jackies parents allow Adam to watch horror movie A Nightmare on Elm Street, and a family disagreement ensues. Meanwhile, Erica starts hanging out at her old high school and soon realises shes not as popular as she once was

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: As the birth of Haley and Dylans twins approaches, the programme reflects on how all the family members celebrated their birthdays in the past year

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley is determined to follow the advice in her parenting books with the twins, but Phil and Claire think their old methods are better. Meanwhile, Manny is set to direct Jays dog bed commercial in the hopes of winning his ex-girlfriend back. Return of the American comedy for what is reportedly its final season, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to Giuseppis and Sante La Brea to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCools from season one

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jerseys Spanish Pavillion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eaterys fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Peralta and Santiago make a bet on which of them can bring in the most escaped prisoners, with the loser forced to move into the winners apartment when they start living together. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. Only one fugitive remains on the loose on the streets of Brooklyn after the mass escape of convicts from the prison van and Peralta is forced to enlist a surprising ally in order to apprehend him. Elsewhere, Santiago and Gina attempt to introduce Boyle to proper texting etiquette. Craig Robinson guest stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge helps a former convict fulfil his artistic ambitions by painting a mural at the school, but he soon clashes with Principal Skinner over the design. With the guest voice of Michael Keaton

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and his friends are recruited to the William Penn Academy baseball team. Barry remains in denial about his pitching skills, while Geoffs father interferes in his relationship with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Assisted by Geoff, Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey, but Barry convinces Geoff that the new musician is trying to steal Erica from him. Adam and Murray each plot to get out of going to Valentines Day dinner with Beverly

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz learn theres more to Lt Melanie Hawkins team than meets the eye as they continue their search for the gang of bank robbers. Jeffords, Boyle and Santiago begin to suspect that Gina is harbouring a secret. Ryan Phillippe, Gina Gershon and Jason Mantzoukas guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta and Diaz are framed for a crime they didnt commit, its up to the other members of the Nine-Nine to find out what really happened and try to save them from going to jail

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer helps Ned build a Christian amusement park called Praiseland as a lasting monument to Maude Flanders. Unfortunately, it meets with an unenthusiastic response - until a seemingly genuine miracle occurs

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Marge and the kids hitch a ride on a train, where they are entertained by a tramp who tells them a series of colourful yarns based on American folklore - all of which feature characters suspiciously reminiscent of Homer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Grampa falls victim to a phone scam, the rest of the Simpsons set out to get his money back. With the guest voice of Alan Cumming

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night, Kristina Goodsell hosts an orange party, which Kieran takes too literally when he turns up dressed in a traffic cone, while Ella comes dressed as her nan

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. Under the watchful eye of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrity bakers attempt decorative choux buns in the signature and tackle financiers in the technical before making a showstopping cake that represents something from their bucket list

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate (2019)
programme.desc: An augmented human and Sarah Connor must stop an advanced liquid Terminator named Rev-9 from hunting down a young girl in Mexico City, whose fate is critical to the human race. As the Rev-9 ruthlessly destroys everything and everyone in its path, the three are led to a T-800 from Sarahs past that may be their last best hope. Sci-fi adventure, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton and Mackenzie Davis

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie join host Anna Richardson and feature as the first picker pair as they search for another woman to join their relationship. Plus 41 year-old actor and glamour puss Chrissie from Leeds is hoping to find husband number four

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson is joined by 25 year-old Lauren, a movie buff and professional online gamer from Camberley who is looking for a geeky gamer to be her perfect player two so she can reboot her love life after three years of being single. Ryan who is 28 and from Cheltenham, is looking for his Mr Right. As a sucker for a silver fox and a dad bod, can he find his dream guy to wake up to every morning?

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Olivia gets a job working for a dressmaker, but as her responsibilities grow, she starts to miss leading a simple life

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Grandma organises a traditional quilting as Mary Ellens birthday approaches, but Mary Ellen rejects the custom as demeaning to her

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: Padraig has an unexpected visitor from his past, and faces the possibility of losing his son. Meanwhile, Quigley starts holding executive paintball weekends. Drama, starring Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Eddies Uncle Fred is diagnosed with leukaemia and decides to make the most of the time he has left, inviting Phyllis to join him on a world cruise - and asking his reluctant nephew to take over the family business. Wilf discovers an old by-law that allows him to charge people every time they enter the village and Michael causes mayhem as he discovers the fun to be had with itching powder. Medical drama, guest starring David Troughton, with James Bolam, Michael French and Maggie Steed

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: The Highland GP has a run-in with an old friend and later investigates what appears to be an attack on a gay man, only to find himself caught up in a traumatic domestic violence case. David Rintoul, Ian Bannen and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.desc: The barrister attends a concert performed by the Casterini Trio. Unfortunately, the cellist is murdered and the finger of blame points at the apparently jealous husband of Elizabeth, the trios seductive violinist. Rumpole agrees to Elizabeths request to defend her spouse, but once the trial gets underway his admiration of her rapidly begins to wane. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A Korean family sets up home in the middle of the 4077th camp, with one girl already in the advanced stages of labour. Comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.desc: The 4077th is stirred from the lethargy of a long lull in hostilities by a sudden influx of casualties, including Frank. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda

Mystery, starring Christopher Plummer, James Mason, Donald Sutherland, John Gielgud and Genevieve Bujold

programme.title: American Monster

programme.desc: The case of 19-year-old Logan Schiendelman, who vanished after a night out. When authorities found no evidence of foul play, they were forced to examine his familys controversial past

programme.sub-title: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: The case of Joyce Alexander, who was terrified of her son William Patrick, fearing he held her responsible for a horrifying crime he had carried out. Twenty-five years on, she became convinced he was plotting his revenge from prison

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: The killing of Sandra Miles by her daughter. Tracie Lynn Miles testified she was under the influence of an abusive boyfriend - who was also convicted in the 1998 strangulation and bludgeoning death

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: How, a couple raising their children in an idyllic rural town, found their quiet lives turned upside down when two of the family were found brutally murdered

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: A case in which transgender teen Sage Smith went missing. The investigation turned up evidence that forced detectives to look closer into Sages inner circle

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: He Almost Got Away with It
programme.desc: The case of killer Timothy Bass, who for decades had told his wife Gina that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: Recollections of a case in which a protective grandfather was found beaten to death on the roadside. News of a recent incident involving a birthday gift led detective Rod Demery to the most unexpected of killers

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: How, following a senseless murder that rocked an African-American neighbourhood in 1970s Detroit, police arrested suspects who were ultimately convicted of the crime. However, 47 years later, the truth finally emerged to right historys wrongs

programme.title: Evil Online
programme.desc: The case of high school student Brandon Wentzell, who fell for Clarissa Chistiakov online. However, Chistiakov was a fake identity and its creator Jessica Boudreau led Wentzell on, inadvertently towards abusing alcohol and painkillers to his untimely death

programme.title: Evil Online
programme.desc: The case of real-estate agent Beverly Carter, who failed to return after arranging to meet a prospective buyer at a remote Arkansas house in September 2014. programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A nurse tries to help an injured alien after his saucer crashes - despite Vincents warnings. Sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.desc: A series of devastating earthquakes are evidence of a massive crack opening up in the surface of the planet. A seismologist teams up with an explosives expert to prevent the world being completely destroyed by the quakes. Disaster movie, starring Brittany Murphy, Eriq La Salle and Bruce Davison

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The Legend of Butch and Sundance (2004)
programme.desc: The story of how two of Americas most infamous outlaws joined forces and tried to make their fortunes with a string of daring robberies. Western, starring David Rogers, Ryan Browning, Rachelle Lefevre and Michael Biehn

programme.title: The Arrival (1996)
programme.desc: A radio astronomer discovers a signal transmitting to Earth and resolves to discover its source. Travelling to Mexico, he unwittingly uncovers an alien conspiracy to take over the planet and finds his own life in danger. Sci-fi thriller, starring Charlie Sheen, Ron Silver, Lindsay Crouse and Teri Polo

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk has his memory erased while investigating a mysterious obelisk on a planet inhabited by a Native American-type civilisation, and the population soon begin to believe that he is a god. Meanwhile, on board the Enterprise, Spock and McCoy try to prevent an asteroid collision that could destroy the world. William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy star

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: An old friend of Vincent sees an alien in the defence plant where he works. Sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Part two of three. The gang is locked in a military prison awaiting trial for the murder of a colonel. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A scientist who has discovered a possible cure for genetic diseases is kidnapped leading Walker to attempt to rescue him. Adventure, starring Chuck Norris

programme.title: Kiss of the Dragon (2001)
programme.desc: A Chinese police officer travels to Paris in search of the head of an international drug ring. However, his target is a corrupt cop who promptly frames him for murder. Fighting to clear his name, he finds an unlikely ally in an American prostitute who offers to testify against the crooked detective in return for help in rescuing her daughter. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li and Bridget Fonda

programme.title: War (2007)
programme.desc: FBI agent Jack Crawfords partner is murdered along with his family by a mysterious assassin named Rogue. Several years later, the elusive killer resurfaces and begins to pick off members of rival Yakuza and Triad gangs one by one, prompting the agent to set out to exact revenge. Martial arts thriller, starring Jet Li, Jason Statham, Devon Aoki, Luis Guzman and Saul Rubinek

programme.title: The Power of One
programme.desc: An English youngster is shocked by the brutal racism endemic in his South African school, and vows to fight for justice. However, an ill-judged romance with the daughter of an apartheid leader brings confusion to his life. Drama set in the 1930s, starring Stephen Dorff, Morgan Freeman, Armin Mueller-Stahl and John Gielgud

programme.title: The Reptile (1966)
programme.desc: Harry and Valerie arrive in the remote Cornish village to an unwelcoming and suspicious population. Harrys brother dies suddenly, bitten by a lethal reptilian bite. They befriend a young woman Anna whose tyrannical father controls her life, as they discover that others in the village have suffered a similar fate, their investigations lead to Anna. What they uncover is a victim of the most terrifying legacy... a destiny of mutilation and murder. Hammer horror, starring Noel Willman, Jacqueline Pearce and Jennifer Daniel.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A scientist who has discovered a possible cure for genetic diseases is kidnapped leading Walker to attempt to rescue him. Adventure, starring Chuck Norris

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Part two of three. The gang is locked in a military prison awaiting trial for the murder of a colonel. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: An old friend of Vincent sees an alien in the defence plant where he works. Sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: The Land That Time Forgot (2009)
programme.desc: A Caribbean cruise ship is left shipwrecked by a mysterious storm and the survivors find themselves stranded on an island inhabited by dinosaurs and a host of other deadly prehistoric creatures. Fantasy adventure, directed by and starring C Thomas Howell. With Timothy Bottoms, Lindsey McKeon and Darren Dalton

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Angel and the Bad Man (2009)
programme.desc: Remake of the John Wayne classic telling the story of notorious gunfighter, Quirt Evans. Western, starring Lou Diamond Phillips and Deborah Kara Unger

programme.title: Shalako (1968)
programme.desc: A party of European aristocrats on a hunting trip in New Mexico falls foul of marauding Apaches and the treachery of a guide, who abandons the group and makes off with their possessions. However, a US army scout knows of their presence in the territory and sets out to the rescue. Western, with Sean Connery, Brigitte Bardot, Jack Hawkins, Honor Blackman, Woody Strode, Peter Van Eyck and Eric Sykes

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The crew answer a distress call from a nearby planet, but on arrival are puzzled to find children playing happily beside their parents bodies. The seemingly harmless youngsters are taken aboard the Enterprise, and its not long before they begin to have a strange effect on their rescuers. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent is shocked to discover the invaders are using a type of seed spore which can develop into fully grown alien creatures. Guest starring Gene Hackman

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Part three of three. As the gang faces a firing squad, General Stockwell agrees to a rescue attempt - but at a price. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trivette begins a relationship with a former girlfriend, unaware the woman is hiding a deadly secret. Adventure, starring Clarence Gilyard and Chuck Norris

programme.title: Death Race (2008)
programme.desc: Jensen Ames is framed for the murder of his wife and sent to Terminal Island Prison, a facility that broadcasts the highly profitable Death Race, a high-octane event where convicts battle to the death in customised cars. When a popular driver dies, crooked prison warden Hennessey persuades Ames to take his place, claiming he will be released if he is victorious. Sci-fi thriller, starring Jason Statham, Joan Allen, Ian McShane and Tyrese Gibson

programme.title: Machete (2010)
programme.desc: A Mexican cop-turned-mercenary is hired by a shadowy businessman to assassinate a politician. When he realises his employers have double-crossed him, he joins forces with a band of militant illegal immigrants to seek a suitably bloody revenge. Action thriller, starring Danny Trejo, Robert De Niro and Jessica Alba

programme.title: The Hunters Prayer (2017)
programme.desc: A drug-addled assassin goes rogue, opting to protect rather than take out his latest target. Action thriller, starring Sam Worthington, Odeya Rush and Allen Leech

programme.title: Unchained (2017)
programme.desc: Three criminals find themselves trapped in a warehouse with the law closing in, but an even greater threat lurks inside. Thriller, starring Adrien Brody and John Malkovich

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A call comes in from a GP surgery for a child suffering a severe asthma attack and paramedics are called out to a young woman with multiple sclerosis who is in considerable pain. A man with advanced bowel cancer who is struggling to breathe is seen to by a district nurse so as to avoid a visit to AandE. Plus, a patient is having their 10th nosebleed in 11 days

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Calls to the ambulance service reach new heights in the early hours of Saturday morning as the clubs start to empty. A young woman is found intoxicated by the side of the road and an amateur boxer has vomited in his sleep and is difficult to rouse after losing a fight. Paramedics are called for a woman who has gone into premature labour at 32 weeks

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The medical team faces a range of sport and drink-related injuries on a busy Saturday, including two women hurt when the bar they were dancing on collapsed, and a bricklayer badly cut in an attempted mugging. The nights most dramatic case occurs when a father and son are brought in with life-threatening injuries after being attacked by gatecrashers at a family birthday party, one of whom was armed with a samurai sword

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The AandE staff of Kings College Hospital in London treat patients involved in accidents, including a construction worker who broke his leg in three places and suffered injuries to his chest after being trapped under a cherry picker. Plus, a man who fell from a ladder and landed on his head, and a widower who had a nasty encounter with a mandoline while chopping vegetables

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: In search of the secret to the bubbles in bubble tea, Kate Quilton visits a cassava farm in Kenya to get to the root of it. Jimmy Doherty is in Somerset exploring why sour milk is sneered at, though soured cream is revered. Plus, Helen Lawal reports from Portugal on canned fish

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks campers arrive at Dalraddy Holiday Park on a traditional Scottish estate at Aviemore. Without leaving the site, campers Jen, Ian and Ellis, Sean and Marie, and Emmy and Simon take a train ride, enjoy some quirky Highland games and battle it out on the paintballing field

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items, and their latest find is an old bureau which gets a makeover in Yorkshire

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets Gill and Paul, a couple from Derbyshire who are searching for a holiday home in Benalmádena on Spains Costa del Sol, on a £110,000 budget. It has been Gills dream for at least 30 years to have a place that she can escape to during the cold, winter months

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five strangers from in and around the Hampshire town of Basingstoke compete to host the best dinner party. Marketing manager and maths enthusiast Nicole is first up with a foodie journey that takes her guests from Lebanon back to the UK via the Caribbean. Will company director Adam, winery worker Izzy, DJ, poet and business owner Mark and cleaning company owner Chris be inpressed by their hosts efforts?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host from in and around Basingstoke, business owner Adam, hopes to impress his guests with authentic Mexican cuisine, inspired by a holiday to a resort in Cancún

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in Basingstoke, DJ and nutritionist Mark goes down the festival route with both his food and the entertainment, and offers his guests his own filtered water

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Basingstoke finds winery worker Izzy planning a sophisticated evening, though whether her fancy approach will prove too much of a risk remains to be seen. DJ and nutritionist Mark irritates Izzy by not sticking to her dress code, while Adam and Chris embrace the black-tie event. Will the self-confessed queen of dinner parties give the guests a night to remember and put herself in the top spot, or will the sophistication be too much for some?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final host from in and around the Hampshire town of Basingstoke is snappy dresser Chris, who hopes to impress his guests with a 90s music dress code and a menu of French dishes made with local produce. Chris has been disappointed with the standard of cooking all week and plans to take it up a notch for the final night, but theres simmering tensions between Mark and well-spoken Izzy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts in Pencader, Carmarthenshire, at the School House BandB, owned by eco-friendly married couple Jayne and Ian Hall-Edwards, who hope that their environmental approach will impress their guests. At dinner, Ian reveals that his hosting skills might not be up to scratch and eyebrows are raised at straight-talking colleagues Jo and Neil. At breakfast, assumptions are made of businessman Raj

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Cathedral 73 in Cardiff, managed by Neil Chidzey. On arrival, guests are wowed by the glamorous rooms, but Raj is shocked to find breakfast is not included

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Leafy Suburban BandB in Northwood, Hertfordshire, where the guests spend the afternoon taking a swing at some golfing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit is to the Wellington Inn, Hertfordshire, where Felicity Rainbow takes a spiritual approach, cleansing the aura of the rooms and encouraging guests to feel the vibe

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. The School House BandB is first and host Jayne Hall-Edwards takes guests back to basics over her green policy. Next, Neil Chidzey and Jo Goodwin from Cathedral 73 challenge their guests over costings

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from the documentary set inside Woodgreen animal charity, including a couple having to choose between a French bulldog and a nervous terrier, a jack russell finding a family that need a dog able to keep up with them, and a dog offering to pull his prospective owners wheelchair along

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Australian shepherd Alfie and the Holmes family are on track to make a new bond, while Missys attachment issues could be too much for a first-time owner

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Clare Balding presents more live coverage from the 122nd edition of Crufts from the National Exhibition Centre in Birmingham, including the first Agility final in the Main Arena, and the Heelwork to Music competition. Plus, all the news from the NECs halls. Ellie Simmonds selects her breed of the day, and resident vet Dr Paul Manktelow answers questions about best practices for dog lovers

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer focus on the layout issues and dilemmas that many developers face in a very different world. In this episode, the duo tackle future-proofing, as in Clifford in West Yorkshire, Vic and Paul Miller need help with their idyllic property, as do the Lindleys from Ashtead in Surrey

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets retired racehorse breeder John and his wife Helen in Dunstable. The couple met at Newbury races in 2005 and wed two years later, living in a 17th-century farmhouse until illness struck in 2018. Helen had a stroke, severely affecting her mobility and leaving her with aphasia, which affects her ability to communicate. With his wife constrained by the steep stairs, narrow doorways and changes in level of their current home, John resolved to make a big change by purchasing a nearby two-acre plot. Following the demolition of an old, dilapidated house on site, a new hi-tech accessible pavilion, complete with wildlife garden, will be built in its place for £1.3million

programme.title: The Antiques Riviera
programme.desc: A couple throw open their home to local dealers, only to discover they may have blown thousands on fake designer furniture. However, one item could be worth millions. Sisters Amy and Laura return to see if their inherited royal relics will fund a family holiday, and a woman grieving the loss of her parents is finally ready to part with their silver heirlooms

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A retired dockworker who suffers from diabetes is brought in with severe stomach pain and doctors believe part of his gut may have permanently stopped working, creating a life-threatening situation where immediate surgery is the only option. Other patients include a man who has twisted his knee dancing in a club, and a cyclist brought in unconscious after falling off his bike

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A man is brought in with stomach pains and a suspected abdominal aortic aneurysm. His son receives a huge blow when he is told his father only has a 50 per cent chance of surviving the operation he urgently needs. A 33-year-old is treated after swallowing a cocktail of drugs in a suicide attempt, and staff fight to save a teenager who was stabbed in a street fight and has lost a life-threatening amount of blood

programme.title: The Antiques Riviera
programme.desc: A couple throw open their home to local dealers, only to discover they may have blown thousands on fake designer furniture. However, one item could be worth millions. Sisters Amy and Laura return to see if their inherited royal relics will fund a family holiday, and a woman grieving the loss of her parents is finally ready to part with their silver heirlooms

A 33-year-old is treated after swallowing a cocktail of drugs in a suicide attempt, and staff fight to save a teenager who was stabbed in a street fight and has lost a life-threatening amount of blood

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits a farm in Cornwall to get to the bottom of the flower element in a in cauliflower. Helen Lawal is in Spain to find out what makes lemon juice last so long, while Matt Tebbutt gets the beers in at a Worksop brewery, as he explores what the term bottle conditioned actually means

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: With their tour of the Highlands drawing to a close, the campers head for Scotlands northern coast, pitching up at Barrow Campsite near Nairn. Having visited five campsites, its time for Sean and Marie, Simon and Emmy, and Ian, Jen and Ellis to pick this weeks perfect pitch. But first - theres some paddleboarding, beach yoga and campfire cocktails to enjoy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel Britain to find items to fix up and flog on to make a handsome profit for their owners. Simon recycles some historic oak, while Henry comes unstuck when he tries to get to grips with an old Ford Escort

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Susan and Ainsley from Cardiff find their perfect holiday home near Mijas on Spains Costa del Sol. The couple, who have two teenage children, feel that nows the right time to buy their dream home in their favourite holiday spot. Laura shows them five impressive properties for their budget of £200,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of five parties from Cheltenham and Gloucester, where dinner party novice Sheree plans to wow her guests with an evening of mythical fantasy and a comprehensive menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Storyteller Chloe is the second to host in Cheltenham and Gloucester, assisted by her cat puppet as she serves up a fairy-tale feast, tall tales and plenty of dragons

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Mike is in charge, and plans to win over his guests by hosting a relaxed evening with no theme and no fancy dress. But how will he cope when Chloe turns up with a surprise guest in tow?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Cheltenham and Gloucester, Dan, the so-called King of Critique, presents a British summer time evening event. After a week in which he has been repeatedly criticising the others over their food, he has set himself up with a lot to prove as a host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Cheltenham and Gloucester, equine events organiser Holly takes her turn as host. However, she soon finds she has some hurdles to overcome. Unhappy with comments on his night, Dan is quick to bicker with Sheree. With their squabbling threatening to dominate Hollys night, it falls to Chloe and Mike to help keep the evening on course

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Ship Inn in Dymchurch, Kent, where James Tindall and Jessica Walton hope to impress their guests and be named best value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Thompson Hall Retreat in Norfolk, boasting stylish shepherd huts, and run by mother and daughter duo Amanda Benton and Becci Howlett

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The White House in Swansea, where guests James and Jessica have an unusual toilet encounter in their room

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Jacobs Plough in Bicester, Oxfordshire, run by manager Duncan Froomes and bar supervisor Ryan Hunt who like to mix banter with business

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid, while also settling some scores

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Three-legged labrador Dave seeks a new best friend, and his owners Laura and Paul hope that Luna, the beautiful but nervous saluki, will win Dave over. Nine-year-old stray westie called Norman gets much attention from mother and son Lorraine and Oliver - upsetting youngster Cynthia, a Staffie cross. Meanwhile, enthusiastic setter-poodle pup Obi might just win the chance to bring the joy and chaos that Mike and his partner Tracey dont yet know they need in their lives

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Three-year-old Ollie and his family search for a forever friend. Can Frankie the pup help Simon overcome a childhood dog attack trauma? Jaran has the chance to become Liz and Scotts first dog

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Clare Balding is joined by Claudia Winkleman for further live coverage from the National Exhibition Centre. Featuring a special event for vulnerable breeds, the terrier and hound events, and the Freestyle Heelwork to Music competition. Plus, Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge as canine athletes of all shapes and sizes climb, weave and jump over obstacles at top speed on the Agility course. Ellie Simmonds explores dog behaviour, and vet Dr Paul Manktelow takes viewers questions

programme.title: Astrid: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: A racehorse belonging to a prestigious stable is killed with an exotic antiquarian weapon, just before a famous race. A young stablehand has disappeared too, and Astrid and Raphaëlle theorise that there may be a connection to the suicide of his father following a horse-doping scandal a decade earlier. In French

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary following life inside an AandE department returns for its first series outside London - at the Queens Medical Centre, Nottingham. Sister Lou tells her story of working at the hospital for more than 30 years and how her life completely changed in her fifties. Forty-five-year-old Kirsty has been rushed into QMC after an accident at a fun run. The team members carry out extensive tests on 93-year-old John, who is suffering from shortness of breath, and in the childrens emergency unit, seven-year-old Hunter is being assessed after falling from a tree

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sara, 46, is rushed in after a car crash with serious head and chest injuries, and 54 year-old Simon comes in after falling off his bike on his way to buy a helmet. As his condition deteriorates, Simon looks back on his life and the things he wishes he had done differently. Sixteen year-old James comes in with a severed finger after trying to climb a fence

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On a Friday night, the paramedics are called out to a man who has reportedly collapsed in the street and isnt breathing. Paramedics also treat a man lying unconscious in an alleyway surrounded by needles whos taken a drug overdose but refuses to go to hospital, and a four-year-old who has a high temperature and a nasty cough. On the same shift, a man is struggling to breathe with an abnormal heart rhythm and a woman has fallen and cant get up. The paramedics need to make sure she hasnt broken any bones

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
