Other patients include a man who has twisted his knee dancing in a club, and a cyclist brought in unconscious after falling off his bike

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A man is brought in with stomach pains and a suspected abdominal aortic aneurysm. His son receives a huge blow when he is told his father only has a 50 per cent chance of surviving the operation he urgently needs. A 33-year-old is treated after swallowing a cocktail of drugs in a suicide attempt, and staff fight to save a teenager who was stabbed in a street fight and has lost a life-threatening amount of blood

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits a farm in Cornwall to get to the bottom of the flower element in a in cauliflower. Helen Lawal is in Spain to find out what makes lemon juice last so long, while Matt Tebbutt gets the beers in at a Worksop brewery, as he explores what the term bottle conditioned actually means

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: With their tour of the Highlands drawing to a close, the campers head for Scotlands northern coast, pitching up at Barrow Campsite near Nairn. Having visited five campsites, its time for Sean and Marie, Simon and Emmy, and Ian, Jen and Ellis to pick this weeks perfect pitch. But first - theres some paddleboarding, beach yoga and campfire cocktails to enjoy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel Britain to find items to fix up and flog on to make a handsome profit for their owners. Simon recycles some historic oak, while Henry comes unstuck when he tries to get to grips with an old Ford Escort

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Susan and Ainsley from Cardiff find their perfect holiday home near Mijas on Spains Costa del Sol. The couple, who have two teenage children, feel that nows the right time to buy their dream home in their favourite holiday spot. Laura shows them five impressive properties for their budget of £200,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of five parties from Cheltenham and Gloucester, where dinner party novice Sheree plans to wow her guests with an evening of mythical fantasy and a comprehensive menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Storyteller Chloe is the second to host in Cheltenham and Gloucester, assisted by her cat puppet as she serves up a fairy-tale feast, tall tales and plenty of dragons

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Mike is in charge, and plans to win over his guests by hosting a relaxed evening with no theme and no fancy dress. But how will he cope when Chloe turns up with a surprise guest in tow?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Cheltenham and Gloucester, Dan, the so-called King of Critique, presents a British summer time evening event. After a week in which he has been repeatedly criticising the others over their food, he has set himself up with a lot to prove as a host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In and around Cheltenham and Gloucester, equine events organiser Holly takes her turn as host. However, she soon finds she has some hurdles to overcome. Unhappy with comments on his night, Dan is quick to bicker with Sheree. With their squabbling threatening to dominate Hollys night, it falls to Chloe and Mike to help keep the evening on course

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Ship Inn in Dymchurch, Kent, where James Tindall and Jessica Walton hope to impress their guests and be named best value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Thompson Hall Retreat in Norfolk, boasting stylish shepherd huts, and run by mother and daughter duo Amanda Benton and Becci Howlett

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The White House in Swansea, where guests James and Jessica have an unusual toilet encounter in their room

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Jacobs Plough in Bicester, Oxfordshire, run by manager Duncan Froomes and bar supervisor Ryan Hunt who like to mix banter with business

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid, while also settling some scores

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Three-legged labrador Dave seeks a new best friend, and his owners Laura and Paul hope that Luna, the beautiful but nervous saluki, will win Dave over. Nine-year-old stray westie called Norman gets much attention from mother and son Lorraine and Oliver - upsetting youngster Cynthia, a Staffie cross. Meanwhile, enthusiastic setter-poodle pup Obi might just win the chance to bring the joy and chaos that Mike and his partner Tracey dont yet know they need in their lives

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Three-year-old Ollie and his family search for a forever friend. Can Frankie the pup help Simon overcome a childhood dog attack trauma? Jaran has the chance to become Liz and Scotts first dog

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Clare Balding is joined by Claudia Winkleman for further live coverage from the National Exhibition Centre. Featuring a special event for vulnerable breeds, the terrier and hound events, and the Freestyle Heelwork to Music competition. Plus, Jim Rosenthal and Graham Partridge as canine athletes of all shapes and sizes climb, weave and jump over obstacles at top speed on the Agility course. Ellie Simmonds explores dog behaviour, and vet Dr Paul Manktelow takes viewers questions

programme.title: Astrid: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: A racehorse belonging to a prestigious stable is killed with an exotic antiquarian weapon, just before a famous race. A young stablehand has disappeared too, and Astrid and Raphaëlle theorise that there may be a connection to the suicide of his father following a horse-doping scandal a decade earlier. In French

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary following life inside an AandE department returns for its first series outside London - at the Queens Medical Centre, Nottingham. Sister Lou tells her story of working at the hospital for more than 30 years and how her life completely changed in her fifties. Forty-five-year-old Kirsty has been rushed into QMC after an accident at a fun run. The team members carry out extensive tests on 93-year-old John, who is suffering from shortness of breath, and in the childrens emergency unit, seven-year-old Hunter is being assessed after falling from a tree

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sara, 46, is rushed in after a car crash with serious head and chest injuries, and 54 year-old Simon comes in after falling off his bike on his way to buy a helmet. As his condition deteriorates, Simon looks back on his life and the things he wishes he had done differently. Sixteen year-old James comes in with a severed finger after trying to climb a fence

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On a Friday night, the paramedics are called out to a man who has reportedly collapsed in the street and isnt breathing. Paramedics also treat a man lying unconscious in an alleyway surrounded by needles whos taken a drug overdose but refuses to go to hospital, and a four-year-old who has a high temperature and a nasty cough. On the same shift, a man is struggling to breathe with an abnormal heart rhythm and a woman has fallen and cant get up. The paramedics need to make sure she hasnt broken any bones

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary following life inside an AandE department returns for its first series outside London - at the Queens Medical Centre, Nottingham. programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: A look at one of Britains worst air disasters - the crash of British European Airways 548, which saw 118 people lose their lives. The plane plummeted shortly after taking off from Heathrow on June 18, 1972 and narrowly missed a main road before crashing into a field. Investigators were forced to rely on witness testimony to determine why the plane nosedived as there was no cockpit voice recorder on board, but both the investigation process and its results were deemed controversial

programme.title: Seconds from Disaster
programme.desc: The repercussions of the 1985 Stava Dam collapse in Italy, a disaster that engulfed two villages in a tidal wave of sludge, killing 268 people. A subsequent investigation found the dam was poorly maintained, allowing the pressure within it to build to a catastrophic level

programme.desc: British photographer Thomas Heaton embarks on a cross-border journey through China and Laos, documenting his experiences aboard an international passenger train, traveling from Kunming in China to Vientiane in Laos. This journey begins through Yunnan, the cultural crossroads of southwest China, travelling from a market in Kunming to the main starting point of the ancient Tea-Horse Road

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.desc: After Charles Is disastrous attempt to impose political and religious uniformity throughout England, Scotland and Ireland, both the Stuart dynasty and its three kingdoms fell into an abyss. In this episode, Dr Clare Jackson reveals how the unprecedented religious violence of the Wars of the Three Kingdoms shaped British political culture and subsequent constitutional crises

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: As relentless firebombing and blockade of war-ravaged Japan shows no sign of securing a surrender, the US reluctantly prepares to invade. First, they need Okinawa, an island close to the mainland, as a base to stage their attack. The Marines fear the worst - but their amphibious invasion is met with almost total silence. Lulled into a false sense of security, its just the calm before the storm

programme.title: Cleopatra: Portrait of a Killer
programme.desc: Following the discovery of a skeleton that archaeologists believe to be the sister of Cleopatra VII, Neil Oliver examines the reign of the ruthless queen. On a journey taking him from Egypt to Turkey, he unravels the story behind the monarchs lust for power and the possible cause of her siblings death

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Part two of two. Joann Fletcher investigates the Ancient Egyptian attitude to death, revealing that to them life was just a dress rehearsal for the perfect afterlife that they were trying to reach. Joann clambers into rarely visited tombs, explores a treasure trove of long-buried objects and examines mummies to discover just why they spent a fortune preparing for death - and what they hoped to find when they got there

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.desc: Clare Jackson examines how the Stuarts became fatally divided by religion, with brothers in opposition and two daughters supporting the overthrow of their father. programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.sub-title: The Battle of the Philippine Sea
programme.desc: Two years after Japans audacious attack on Pearl Harbor, Americas great war machine now has them on the back foot. The US Navy devise a way to end the war - taking a series of island groups, from where they can directly strike Japans home islands

programme.title: Egypts Lost Queens
programme.desc: Professor Joann Fletcher explores what it was like to be a woman of power in ancient Egypt, examining four of the civilisations most powerful female rulers through a wealth of spectacular buildings, personal artefacts and amazing tombs. programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: An extraordinary double search within one family, beginning as sister Maureen looks for her brother Keith to tell him the truth about their father, followed by a further search with Keith to find out more about the birth mother he never knew. programme.title: The Irish Civil War
programme.desc: Documentary telling the epic and often challenging story of the origins, conflict and legacy of the civil war that took place in Ireland in 1922 and 1923. Narrated by Brendan Gleeson, the series features extensive film footage, interviews with leading academics, archive interviews with contemporary participants and witnesses and first-hand witness accounts read by actors, all combining to tell one of the most controversial chapters in Irish history

programme.desc: Ireland v Wales (Kick-off 8.10pm). Jacqui Hurley presents all the action from the opening match in the fourth round of fixtures, held at Aviva Stadium. Garry Ringrose was shown a 20-minute red card last year at the Principality Stadium with Ireland 10-3 ahead, and Wales made the most of the visitors being down to 14 men by scoring 15 unanswered points to lead 18-10 thanks to tries from Jac Morgan and Tom Rogers. However, Six Nations debutant Jamie Osborne then scored a brilliant try for the Irish as they fought back to win 27-18. With analysis from Jamie Heaslip, Simon Zebo and Stephen Ferris

Garry Ringrose was shown a 20-minute red card last year at the Principality Stadium with Ireland 10-3 ahead, and Wales made the most of the visitors being down to 14 men by scoring 15 unanswered points to lead 18-10 thanks to tries from Jac Morgan and Tom Rogers. However, Six Nations debutant Jamie Osborne then scored a brilliant try for the Irish as they fought back to win 27-18. With analysis from Jamie Heaslip, Simon Zebo and Stephen Ferris

programme.desc: The department deals with the fallout of the riot in the tower buildings. DAngelo impresses Stringer with his efforts at running the business, but his crews drug stash is later taken by a rival operator. Bubbles brings undercover officer Sydnor to the Franklin Terrace low-rises, while McNulty and Greggs receive surveillance gear from an FBI agent as the detail prepares for a raid on DAngelos gang. Detective Freamon unearths a photo of the elusive Avon. Dominic West and Sonja Sohn star

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Bill Comptons allure is diminished when Sookie visits him at home and finds that several other vampires have also dropped by for a visit. Elsewhere, Sam looks for a remedy to his long-term loneliness, and Tara seeks respite from her mothers alcohol-fuelled rage

programme.sub-title: And Now His Watch Is Ended
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch become increasingly hostile to Craster, and Arya is brought before the commander of the Brotherhood Without Banners. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys takes charge of her army of the Unsullied, while in Kings Landing, Cersei tells her father that Margaery is manipulating Joffrey, and Varys meets his match when he talks to Lady Olenna. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Maisie Williams, Conleth Hill and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The Hound is judged by the gods, while Jaime receives a different form of justice at the hands of men. Robb is betrayed, Jon proves himself and Tyrion learns the true cost of a wedding. Fantasy drama, starring Richard Madden, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Lord Tywin plans strategic unions for the Lannisters, Melisandre visits the Riverlands and Robb weighs up a compromise to repair his alliance with House Frey. Roose Bolton decides what to do with Jaime, while Jon, Ygritte and the wildlings face a daunting climb. Fantasy drama, starring Charles Dance

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Walter protests against his time spent in the hospital and occupational therapy, only for the situation to worsen when Paul tries to discuss his wife Connies rehabilitation. The patient blames himself for her problems because he spent too much time working, and when the psychotherapist tries to help, he breaks down in tears. Drama, starring John Mahoney and Gabriel Byrne

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: The pilot episode of the US drama series finds New Jersey mobster Tony Soprano suffering a midlife crisis and seeking help from psychiatrist Dr Jennifer Melfi. Tonys troubles are numerous - his marriage to Carmela is under strain, daughter Meadow is causing friction and son Anthony Jr remains unaware of his fathers dubious profession. James Gandolfini, Lorraine Bracco and Edie Falco star

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony begins to think that no one can do without him, with requests coming from all quarters. Elderly mum Livia claims she needs help around the house, while Anthony Jr needs someone to find his science teachers stolen car. Offbeat gangster drama, starring James Gandolfini and Lorraine Bracco

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In 2002, seven years after the Dora Lange murder was supposedly wrapped up, Cohle begins investigating old missing persons cases and visits preacher Joel Theriot for information about the Tuttle schools. Meanwhile, Marty has a chance encounter with Beth, one of the girls from the trailer-park brothel he and Rust visited when they looked for connections to the victim back in 1995. In 2012, Papania and Gilbough interview Maggie, who denies her divorce had anything to do with her ex-husbands former partner. Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson star

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: After convincing Hart that he owes a moral debt to Dora Lange, Cohle persuades his former partner to help him reinvestigate the case and shows him evidence he has collated in his independent search for the truth. They interview a relative of Reggie and Dewall Ledoux, as well as a former housekeeper to Sam Tuttle, and they both mention the scarred man who keeps cropping up in their inquiries

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As the former partners go back over the case files of the Dora Lange murder, a witnesss description of a green-eared figure gives the pair new impetus when Hart makes a connection. After following the lead, the pair head out to a remote house in the bayou, where they finally encounter the scarred man they have been hunting, but he flees into a labyrinthine structure - with Cohle in pursuit. Crime drama, starring Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: True Detective
programme.sub-title: The Western Book of the Dead
programme.desc: Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology relocates from Louisiana to California to introduce morally compromised detective Ray Velcoro (Colin Farrell), Ventura County sheriff Ani Bezzerides (Rachel McAdams), Highway Patrol officer Paul Woodrugh (Taylor Kitsch) and career criminal Frank Semyon (Vince Vaughn). The quartet find their paths converging as an investigation gets under way into the murder of a high-profile businessman. Crime thriller, also starring Kelly Reilly

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Casperes autopsy reveals the gruesome details of his demise, and Ray and Ani wonder if it is related to his fondness for prostitutes. Meanwhile, Frank looks into what might have happened to his missing fortune

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As repercussions from Casperes murder reach Frank and the Vinci Mayors office, Ray and Ani have a close call with the killer. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the face of corruption and bent politicians, damaged cops Velcoro, Bezzerides and Woodrugh find it difficult to keep the case straight

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Ray and Frank contemplate new life choices, Ani and Paul follow a lead up the coast. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Daenerys and her entourage discover Yunkais powerful friends are the Second Sons, an elite army of mercenaries. Determined to take the city and increase the strength of her own forces, the queen agrees to meet the sellsword companys captains - intending to make them a better offer. Meanwhile, Davos is still desperate to make Stannis see clearly and demands to see proof of Melisandres power. There is a wedding in Kings Landing, and beyond the Wall, Sam and Gilly have a chilling encounter with a foe that seems to have come straight from their nightmares. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke and Liam Cunningham

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robb and his bannermen gather at the Twins in the northern Riverlands to attend the wedding of Lord Edmure Tully and Roslin Frey, daughter of Lord Walder. Elsewhere, Jon faces his harshest test to date, Daario and Ser Jorah debate how to take Yunkai, and Bran discovers a new gift. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Richard Madden, Michelle Fairley and David Bradley

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Amid the battle between Seattles warring factions, Ellies search draws her towards a devastating confrontation. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The ongoing conflict on Peleliu takes its toll on Sledge as the Japanese soldiers dig into their positions, forcing the Americans to pick them off one by one, and he nearly succumbs to joining his comrades in their hunt for macabre trophies. Back in the US, Basilone becomes disillusioned with his role selling war bonds and longs to rejoin his comrades in the Pacific. War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: A restless Basilone is assigned to train new recruits after urging the army to give him a more active role, but finds himself becoming surprisingly close to a female sergeant at his new base. However, the pair are driven apart when he is called on to lead his trainees into battle on Iwo Jima. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US Marines who served in the conflict, starring Jon Seda and Annie Parisse

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Avon puts a bounty on Omar for stealing his drug stash and McNulty and Bunk reinvestigate the murder of a woman that may be linked to Barksdales crew. Those caught in the police raid on the low-rises refuse to give up their superiors, and dealer Bodie escapes from juvenile detention. Drama, starring Dominic West and Wood Harris

programme.title: True Blood

Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne

programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.desc: Nucky is forced to confront painful memories from his childhood when his father suffers an accident at home, but is surprised when Margaret seems unwilling to hear about his past. Jimmy goes to hospital, where he befriends a disfigured former soldier with an intriguing story to tell. Meanwhile, Angela worries about how her clandestine affair will affect her future, Chalkys suspicions are aroused by a mysterious visitor, and Lucy makes a desperate bid for Nuckys affections. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Pitt

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky heads for the Republican Party convention in Chicago, where he tries to influence plans for the presidential election - and crosses paths with Jimmy once more. Back in New Jersey, Eli is eager to prove he can step into his brothers shoes, while Van Alden struggles to deal with his wifes problems, Gillian tries to offer Angela financial advice, and an alcohol-fuelled Lucy causes a scene at the Ritz - forcing Margaret to intervene. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Michael Pitt

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Jimmy returns to Atlantic City, having decided to work with Nucky again - but is determined to do it on his own terms. However, he is surprised to learn that neither his boss nor Angela had been expecting him. Meanwhile, an under-pressure Mme Jeunet begs Margaret to persuade Nucky to lower her rates, Rothstein welcomes a new face into the fold, and Robert Dittrich raises Angelas hopes of getting her big break in the art world. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky gets an unexpected opportunity for revenge on his would-be assassins, and enlists Chalky to help bring them down. Masked sniper Richard Harrow struggles to fit in at his new lodgings, while Margaret is delighted when a law is passed giving women the right to vote - unaware that the good news has made her an increasingly important part of Nuckys plans. Meanwhile, a dressing-down from Elliott causes Val Aldens behaviour to become increasingly erratic. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The various warring factions of Westeros receive news of the events of the wedding at the Twins. In Kings Landing, Joffrey stands up to his grandfather Tywin, Daenerys discovers whether shell be remembered as a conqueror or a liberator in Yunkai, and mercy comes from a surprising source in Dragonstone. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Charles Dance and Jack Gleeson

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion is sent out to welcome a royal party from Dorne outside the walls of Kings Landing, and Jon Snow finds himself on trial at Castle Black over his time with the wildlings and the death of Qhorin Halfhand. Daenerys heads toward the slave city of Meereen, and Arya runs into a familiar face. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: In the clearing behind her home, six-year-old Clare Abshire encounters 36-year-old time traveller Henry DeTamble for the first time. Fourteen years later, an unexpected reunion at the library gives Henry the opportunity to meet Clare. Adaptation of Audrey Niffeneggers novel, starring Rose Leslie and Theo James

programme.title: Task
programme.sub-title: Out Beyond Ideas of Wrongdoing and Rightdoing, There Is a River
programme.desc: The task force, Dark Hearts and Robbie converge in the woods, leading to a dramatic showdown with far-reaching consequences for all involved. In the aftermath, Tom turns his attention back to his now fragmented team as the FBI launches an investigation

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: The detail receives cloned pagers to get a lead on the Barksdale gangs plans, but has trouble cracking a code used by the dealers - until a solution arrives from an unlikely source. Stringer warns DAngelo there might be an informant in his crew, Carver and Herc track down Bodie, and Omar makes McNulty and Greggs an offer. Drama, starring Dominic West, Idris Elba and Larry Gilliard Jr

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Sookie tells Bill she has decided to stop seeing him and accepts Sams invitation to go on a date - but things do not go as planned. Elsewhere, Jason continues to score vampire blood from Lafayette, and also takes an interest in Tara. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Robb and his bannermen gather at the Twins in the northern Riverlands to attend the wedding of Lord Edmure Tully and Roslin Frey, daughter of Lord Walder. Elsewhere, Jon faces his harshest test to date, Daario and Ser Jorah debate how to take Yunkai, and Bran discovers a new gift. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire novels, starring Richard Madden, Michelle Fairley and David Bradley

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Bill Comptons allure is diminished when Sookie visits him at home and finds that several other vampires have also dropped by for a visit. Elsewhere, Sam looks for a remedy to his long-term loneliness, and Tara seeks respite from her mothers alcohol-fuelled rage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: And Now His Watch Is Ended
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch become increasingly hostile to Craster, and Arya is brought before the commander of the Brotherhood Without Banners. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys takes charge of her army of the Unsullied, while in Kings Landing, Cersei tells her father that Margaery is manipulating Joffrey, and Varys meets his match when he talks to Lady Olenna. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Maisie Williams, Conleth Hill and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The Hound is judged by the gods, while Jaime receives a different form of justice at the hands of men. Robb is betrayed, Jon proves himself and Tyrion learns the true cost of a wedding. Fantasy drama, starring Richard Madden, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Lord Tywin plans strategic unions for the Lannisters, Melisandre visits the Riverlands and Robb weighs up a compromise to repair his alliance with House Frey. Roose Bolton decides what to do with Jaime, while Jon, Ygritte and the wildlings face a daunting climb. Fantasy drama, starring Charles Dance

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Walter protests against his time spent in the hospital and occupational therapy, only for the situation to worsen when Paul tries to discuss his wife Connies rehabilitation. The patient blames himself for her problems because he spent too much time working, and when the psychotherapist tries to help, he breaks down in tears. Drama, starring John Mahoney and Gabriel Byrne

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: The pilot episode of the US drama series finds New Jersey mobster Tony Soprano suffering a midlife crisis and seeking help from psychiatrist Dr Jennifer Melfi. Tonys troubles are numerous - his marriage to Carmela is under strain, daughter Meadow is causing friction and son Anthony Jr remains unaware of his fathers dubious profession. James Gandolfini, Lorraine Bracco and Edie Falco star

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony begins to think that no one can do without him, with requests coming from all quarters. Elderly mum Livia claims she needs help around the house, while Anthony Jr needs someone to find his science teachers stolen car. Offbeat gangster drama, starring James Gandolfini and Lorraine Bracco

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In 2002, seven years after the Dora Lange murder was supposedly wrapped up, Cohle begins investigating old missing persons cases and visits preacher Joel Theriot for information about the Tuttle schools. Meanwhile, Marty has a chance encounter with Beth, one of the girls from the trailer-park brothel he and Rust visited when they looked for connections to the victim back in 1995. In 2012, Papania and Gilbough interview Maggie, who denies her divorce had anything to do with her ex-husbands former partner. Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson star

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: After convincing Hart that he owes a moral debt to Dora Lange, Cohle persuades his former partner to help him reinvestigate the case and shows him evidence he has collated in his independent search for the truth. They interview a relative of Reggie and Dewall Ledoux, as well as a former housekeeper to Sam Tuttle, and they both mention the scarred man who keeps cropping up in their inquiries

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As the former partners go back over the case files of the Dora Lange murder, a witnesss description of a green-eared figure gives the pair new impetus when Hart makes a connection. After following the lead, the pair head out to a remote house in the bayou, where they finally encounter the scarred man they have been hunting, but he flees into a labyrinthine structure - with Cohle in pursuit. Crime drama, starring Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: True Detective
programme.sub-title: The Western Book of the Dead
programme.desc: Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology relocates from Louisiana to California to introduce morally compromised detective Ray Velcoro (Colin Farrell), Ventura County sheriff Ani Bezzerides (Rachel McAdams), Highway Patrol officer Paul Woodrugh (Taylor Kitsch) and career criminal Frank Semyon (Vince Vaughn). The quartet find their paths converging as an investigation gets under way into the murder of a high-profile businessman. Crime thriller, also starring Kelly Reilly

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Casperes autopsy reveals the gruesome details of his demise, and Ray and Ani wonder if it is related to his fondness for prostitutes. Meanwhile, Frank looks into what might have happened to his missing fortune

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As repercussions from Casperes murder reach Frank and the Vinci Mayors office, Ray and Ani have a close call with the killer. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the face of corruption and bent politicians, damaged cops Velcoro, Bezzerides and Woodrugh find it difficult to keep the case straight

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Ray and Frank contemplate new life choices, Ani and Paul follow a lead up the coast. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell

programme.desc: Amid the battle between Seattles warring factions, Ellies search draws her towards a devastating confrontation. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The ongoing conflict on Peleliu takes its toll on Sledge as the Japanese soldiers dig into their positions, forcing the Americans to pick them off one by one, and he nearly succumbs to joining his comrades in their hunt for macabre trophies. Back in the US, Basilone becomes disillusioned with his role selling war bonds and longs to rejoin his comrades in the Pacific. War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: A restless Basilone is assigned to train new recruits after urging the army to give him a more active role, but finds himself becoming surprisingly close to a female sergeant at his new base. However, the pair are driven apart when he is called on to lead his trainees into battle on Iwo Jima. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US Marines who served in the conflict, starring Jon Seda and Annie Parisse

programme.desc: Avon puts a bounty on Omar for stealing his drug stash and McNulty and Bunk reinvestigate the murder of a woman that may be linked to Barksdales crew. programme.title: The Crazies (2010)
programme.desc: The sheriff of a quiet little town investigates a series of unexpected murders, trying to work out what could have driven seemingly normal, well-adjusted people to kill. He discovers that a toxic chemical has turned many of the townsfolk into bloodthirsty maniacs, leaving those unaffected battling for survival. Horror remake, with Timothy Olyphant and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: The Radleys (2024)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary family hide a dark secret, but eventually parents Helen and Peter are forced to confront who they are, with the help of Peters twin brother, Will. Director Euros Lyns horror comedy co-written by Jo Brand, starring Kelly Macdonald, Damian Lewis and Sophia Di Martino

programme.desc: A spaceship crashes on a desolate alien planet inhabited by nocturnal predators. The creatures fear of light seems to guarantee the survivors safety - but when an eclipse takes place, they face a desperate struggle to survive. Their only hope lies with a convicted murderer, who is equally at home in the darkness - but is far from trustworthy. Sci-fi horror, starring Vin Diesel and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside towns tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chiefs efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielbergs blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: M3GAN 2.0 (2025)
programme.desc: Two years following M3GANs rampage, her creator, Gemma, resorts to resurrecting her infamous creation in order to take down Amelia, the military-grade weapon built by a defense contractor who stole M3GANs underlying tech, which has turned on its creators. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Violet McGraw, Jemaine Clement and Allison Williams

programme.title: A Quiet Place (2018)
programme.desc: Two parents do whatever it takes to keep their children safe in a world full of creatures hunting every sound they hear. Nothing can be heard from the family hiding in silence, but all it takes is one noise and everything can go horrifically wrong. Horror, starring real-life husband-and-wife duo Emily Blunt and John Krasinski, who also directed

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One (2024)
programme.desc: During a day trip to watch a theatre performance, terminally ill cancer patient Sam witnesses Earths terrifying first contact with the Death Angels - sightless creatures, which hunt by sound. Calmly resigned to her demise, she embarks on a lonely trek to Harlem to enjoy a final slice of pizza from the restaurant where her late father took her as a child. Horror prequel, starring Lupita Nyongo, Joseph Quinn and Alex Wolff

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside towns tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chiefs efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielbergs blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: 28 Years Later (2025)
programme.desc: Decades since the rage virus took hold, the survivors live on a small island. When one of the group leaves on a mission into the mainland, he discovers secrets, wonders, and horrors that have mutated not only the infected but other survivors. Danny Boyles horror thriller sequel, starring Jodie Comer, Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Ralph Fiennes and Rocco Haynes

programme.title: Smile 2 (2024)
programme.desc: Pop sensation Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Writer/director Parker Finns horror sequel, starring Naomi Scott, Kyle Gallner and Drew Barrymore

programme.title: Pet Sematary (1989)
programme.desc: A father tries to resurrect his dead son by placing him in an enchanted burial ground but the plan backfires with devastating results. Horror, starring Dale Midkiff, Fred Gwynne and Denise Crosby, with a cameo appearance by author Stephen King, whose book provided the basis for the film

programme.title: Pitch Black (2000)
programme.desc: A spaceship crashes on a desolate alien planet inhabited by nocturnal predators. The creatures fear of light seems to guarantee the survivors safety - but when an eclipse takes place, they face a desperate struggle to survive. Their only hope lies with a convicted murderer, who is equally at home in the darkness - but is far from trustworthy. Sci-fi horror, starring Vin Diesel and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: Salems Lot (2024)
programme.desc: A writer attempts to destroy vampires in a small American town. Horror based on Stephen Kings novel of the same name, starring Lewis Pullman, Makenzie Leigh, Jordan Preston Carter and Alfre Woodard

programme.title: The Cinema List: Jurassic (2025)
programme.desc: Welcome to a Cinema List 65 million years in the making, going through the best moments from the Jurassic franchise - from the 1993 original to Jurassic World: Dominion

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: American Sniper (2014)
programme.desc: A Navy Seal becomes a legend to his colleagues thanks to his skills as a deadly sniper. On his return to the US following four tours of duty in Iraq, he finds living an ordinary life as a husband and father far more difficult to deal with than the demands of warfare. Biopic based on the experiences of real-life Iraq conflict veteran Chris Kyle, directed by Clint Eastwood and starring Bradley Cooper, Sienna Miller and Kyle Gallner

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolans wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: The Bodyguard (1992)
programme.desc: Rachel Marron, a famous singer and actress is subjected to death threats by an obsessive fan and persuaded to hire a former secret service agent as her bodyguard. However, neither she or her new minder realise the effect they are about to have on each others lives. Romantic thriller directed by Mick Jackson, starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp and Bill Cobbs

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolans wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead

programme.title: Sinners (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to escape their troubled pasts, twin brothers return to their hometown to start over, only to find an even darker force waiting to welcome them back. Writer/director Ryan Cooglers blockbusting horror thriller, starring Michael B Jordan, Miles Caton and Saul Williams

programme.title: Troy (2004)
programme.desc: A Trojan prince elopes with the king of Spartas wife, sparking a bitter and bloody war between a mighty alliance of Greek kings and the city of Troy, whose champion engages in intense personal conflict with the enemys most formidable warrior. Wolfgang Petersens adventure, inspired by Homers epic poem The Iliad, with Brad Pitt, Eric Bana, Orlando Bloom, Brian Cox, Sean Bean and Peter OToole

programme.title: Taxi Driver (1976)
programme.desc: An isolated, misanthropic New York cab driver becomes increasingly disturbed by the corruption he sees all around him. His desperate attempts to make connections with a political campaigner and a teenage prostitute, whom he feels compelled to save, seem doomed to failure, and he is gradually driven towards a brutal act of violence. Martin Scorseses drama, starring Robert De Niro, Jodie Foster, Cybill Shepherd and Harvey Keitel

programme.title: Bone Lake (2024)
programme.desc: A couples holiday is upended when theyre forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: King Ivory (2024)
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the citys criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time-travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.title: King Ivory (2024)
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the citys criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster

programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation
programme.desc: The presenter explores the case of John Straffen, who killed two young girls in the summer of 1951. He was found to be unfit to plead and committed to Broadmoor Hospital, but during a brief escape from the facility in 1952 he killed again. It was determined that the cause of his behaviour was severe brain damage, traced back to an attack of encephalitis as a child in India. When he died in 2007, he was the longest-serving prisoner in Britain

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson takes a four-day trek along the coastline between Plymouth in Devon and Falmouth, learning about the thriving smuggling trade in Cornwall during the late 18th century. The areas tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves were ideal for illicit imports such as tobacco and brandy, and the business was so huge it threatened the national economy. Along his route, visiting such beauty spots as Lantic Bay and Polperro, he encounters all sorts of reminders of the trade and meets descendants of those involved

programme.title: Instruments of Death

programme.title: Curse of the Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts examines the disastrous final days of the Roman Empire, including the cataclysmic power vacuum following its collapse and the effects felt even beyond the Empires borders. Once known as the Dark Ages, this period saw kingdoms rise and fall, cities wiped out by invasion, and plague ravage Europe and the Middle East. Despite these disasters, archaeologists are revealing a world where trade continued, cultures flourished, and new world religions emerged and spread. Alice reveals how humankind continued to prosper even during the darkest of times

programme.title: Curse of the Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts reveals how archaeologists are shedding light on one of historys most mysterious periods. For 300 years after the collapse of Rome, Saxons and Vikings rampaged through Europe. However, these pagan societies then seemed to disappear. From new discoveries of Viking settlements and burials in Scandinavia, to the last stand of paganism against Christendom in Poland, Alice reveals the catastrophes, calamities and disasters which helped shape modern Europe

programme.title: Titanic: A Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: As the Titanic started to sink in April 1912, another ship came into view, offering her passengers the hope of being rescued. However, despite a fusillade of rockets, the ship turned away. Within two hours, 1,500 people were dead. An American investigation at the time accused the SS Californian, even though the freighter was stationary that night. A British inquiry concurred, keen to shift blame from national failures on lifeboat provision and steamship supervision. However, since Titanics wreck was discovered, the mystery began to unlock, and now, with recently discovered clues, a new suspect has emerged: the SS Mount Temple. This documentary follows a range of experts, using the latest investigative tools, as they examine these new clues and revisit the evidence from 1912 to take a fresh look at the cold case of the 20th century

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Part two of two. Martouf and the team are captured by one of Hells denizens, who uses a hallucinogenic drug on the prisoners to extract essential information. The painful memories they are forced to relive soon make it hard for them to distinguish between past traumas and the present day, putting their sanity - and their lives - in serious jeopardy. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tom Paris and Harry Kim enter the Delta Flyer in a spaceship race, unaware of the dangers involved. At the last moment, BElanna Torres swaps places with Kim in an attempt to salvage her failing relationship with Paris

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A Ferengi whose child Picard killed in battle several years previously, reveals he plans to avenge the death by murdering the Enterprise captains son. The team is faced with locating and protecting the boy - a task which proves more difficult when he contracts a mystery illness. Patrick Stewart stars

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: With most of the team trapped in the bunker with the menagerie of future predators, Leek releases a Silurian sand scorpion at a busy beach and threatens to let loose more horrors. Stephen is the only one who can battle the scorpion, and as he does so Cutter and the others plot their escape - only to realise that if they do, they will unleash the creatures around them

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: Two days after D-Day, Easy Company is ordered to take the town of Carentan, a battle that results in casualties despite its apparent success. The battalion is finally sent to England after 36 days in Normandy, but the respite proves short-lived as the orders come to move out again

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: After a string of heavy casualties, a group of inexperienced paratroopers joins Easy Company in time for the massive Operation Market Garden. Aimed at invading Germany via Holland, the mission goes well until a combined force of American troops and British tanks runs into superior German opposition

programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: They Dont Pay Us Enough to Think
programme.desc: A bloodbath on the streets of Chinatown prompts the Hop Wei and Long Zii to consider a novel way to end hostilities, while Ah Toy and her real-estate business partner Leonard Patterson hit a fork in the road in their effort to buy a valuable piece of land. programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team returns from a mission to hear about a chemical leak at the base, but during tests Dr Frasier is seen talking to two aliens, arousing their suspicion. Carter and Tealc quickly realise nobody can be trusted and seek help from outside

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A mysterious assailant uses subliminal mind-control techniques to turn the crew members against each other - but it transpires the perpetrator could be closer to home than anyone realises. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kate Mulgrew and Jeri Ryan

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data suspects the Enterprise may be thinking for itself when a series of unexplained malfunctions occurs. Sci-fi drama, starring Patrick Stewart and Brent Spiner

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A crocodile-like monster from ancient Egypt breaks through an anomaly at the British Museum, and a race against time ensues as Cutter, Abby and new head of security Captain Becker chase the otherworldly animal through London, while Connor and museum archaeologist Sarah stand guard

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: The case of Suzanne Greenhill, a deaf woman murdered in her own home, and how the investigation took forensics teams on a trail through Europe

programme.title: For a Few Dollars More (1965)
programme.desc: An enigmatic gunslinger forms an uneasy alliance with a military veteran to track down a notorious outlaw - but tensions simmer as their very different motives for the hunt put them increasingly at odds. Sergio Leones Western sequel, starring Clint Eastwood, Lee Van Cleef, Gian Maria Volonte, Josef Egger, Mara Krup and Klaus Kinski

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: Chinatown gathers to witness a prize fight between elite warriors from the Hop Wei and Long Zii, while Buckley plays a bluff in the hopes of getting Mercer to lower his fee. Bill and Lee question Wang Chao about the recent series of sword killings in San Francisco

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The team prepares to release two servals, but things go awry when one vanishes into Malawis dangerous capital. Plus, a monkey arrives in a critical condition

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: The deadly world of snake catching Down Under, where even the smallest mistake could have lethal consequences. Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second deadliest snake in the world, while Stuart and Olivia tangle with a carpet python

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Stuart and Olivia intercept two male brown snakes duelling for mating rights at a construction site

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: An exploration of the wildlife on Baffin in the Canadian Arctic, encountering arctic foxes, white beluga whales, a never-before-filmed two-tusked narwhal and more

programme.title: Arctic from Above
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin discovers how plastic pollution is affecting seabirds, encounters a bison and learns how climate change is impacting bears and beavers

programme.title: Africas Wild Horizons
programme.desc: Tanzanias vast Ngorongoro Crater is in many ways a perfect home for wildlife. However, its isolation also threatens their futures

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Vet Arga sets out to rescue a newly orphaned one-year-old orangutan from a remote village, but when she arrives back at the school, the orphan is found to have a broken wrist. The release candidates have passed all their health checks and embark on the 24-hour journey by road and river back into the wild. Big Boy Beni has a gum infection and is put on an even stricter diet, which means his beloved bananas are off the menu, and it is an extremely emotional moment for staff when five adult orangutans are at last set free in the wild

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Jess faces her fears chasing a lace monitor lizard up a tree with an active beehive

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Diving into tight spaces, underneath hot houses and into tense rescue situations as the catchers confront a six-foot-long, highly venomous brown snake

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison is in the Lebanon to rescue two rare, endangered, guenon monkeys who were illegally smuggled from the wild. Back at the park, the chimps enjoy a wobbly treat

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Guenon monkeys Benny and Nia finally arrive at Monkey World and get to see their new home. A vet is called in to get to the bottom of chimp Freddys uncomfortable problem

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: Part one of two. The reasons why young animals enjoy playing, and how it can teach them to survive in the wild. The programme explores how young elephants, which rarely leave their mothers side for the first eight years of life, play to develop social skills, while macaques hone their mental agility by playing games with stones. Plus, a zoologist who looks after orphaned cheetahs reveals how play can help cubs learn to hunt

programme.desc: A friendless, moody 10-year-old spends his free time terrorising ants - until the tiny creatures take their revenge by magically reducing him to their own size and forcing him to learn how to contribute to colony life. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Julia Roberts, Nicolas Cage, Meryl Streep and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Harriet the Spy (1996)
programme.desc: A precocious youngsters diary falls into the wrong hands and its contents are made public knowledge, prompting those featured in its pages to plot their revenge for the things she has written about them and forcing her to set the record straight. Family comedy, based on Louise Fitzhughs novel, starring Michelle Trachtenberg, Vanessa Lee Chester, Gregory Smith and Rosie ODonnell

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz (1939)
programme.desc: Youngster Dorothy Gale is whisked over the rainbow by a tornado into the magical land of Oz, where she inadvertently kills a wicked witch - incurring the wrath of another. Setting out to find the wizard who can show her a way home, she is joined on her journey by a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who all hope their own wishes will be granted. Musical fantasy, with Judy Garland, Ray Bolger, Jack Haley, Bert Lahr and Frank Morgan

programme.title: A Dogs Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: The Wild Robot (2024)
programme.desc: Following a shipwreck, a robot called Roz survives on an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals. Family animation, with the voices of Lupita Nyongo, Pedro Pascal, Kit Connor and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Shrek (2001)
programme.desc: Anti-social ogre Shrek resolves to stop an evil ruler from banishing fairy-tale characters to his swampland home. However, the reluctant hero ends up forced to rescue the beautiful Princess Fiona from a castle guarded by a dragon, aided only by a wisecracking donkey. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, John Lithgow, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy and Vincent Cassel

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: Wicked (2024)
programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Its the beginning of a friendship which culminates in an epic showdown as Elphaba transforms a renegade witch with a skill for bursting into show-stopping songs, like Defying Gravity. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starring Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande-Butera, Jonathan Bailey, Michelle Yeoh and Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the childrens books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

The trio become concerned when the Old Man, who narrates their illustrated existence, suddenly falls silent. Using his magical crayon, Harold draws a door to the real world and tumbles into the present day as a flesh-and-blood man, who collides head-on with widow Terry and her young son, Mel. Family adventure, starring Zachary Levi, Lil Rel Howery, Zooey Deschanel and Benjamin Bottani

programme.title: Oliver! (1968)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning musical version of the stage play based on Charles Dickens classic tale about a lonely workhouse orphan who ends up on the cold streets of London, where he falls under the wing of petty crook Fagin and his gang of young backstreet thieves. Featuring the iconic songs Food, Glorious Food, Consider Yourself, As Long as He Needs Me and Youve Got to Pick a Pocket or Two. Starring Ron Moody, Mark Lester, Oliver Reed, Jack Wild, Harry Secombe, Shani Wallis and Leonard Rossiter

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat (2003)
programme.desc: Two bored youngsters are led on a series of zany misadventures when a manic moggy comes knocking at their door with a magical stovepipe hat on his head and mischief in mind. Comedy fantasy based on the childrens book by Dr Seuss, starring Mike Myers, Alec Baldwin, Dakota Fanning and Spencer Breslin

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Bill and Eric catch Sookie unawares when they ask her to help in their search for the missing Russell Edgington. Lafayette is menaced by gruesome visions of his dead lover Jesus, and Tara bonds with Jessica as she starts work at Fangtasia. Meanwhile, Terry and Patrick encounter an old war buddy, who reveals they were cursed during their tour of duty in Iraq

programme.title: True Blood

Meanwhile, Jason takes Sookie to the fairy burlesque club, where she discovers the truth about their parents death

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Jack sets out to uncover the truth about his sisters job, but soon finds himself under attack from a Megopteran, a huge carnivorous insect-like futuristic creature. Seeking refuge in a race car at a test track, he inadvertently drives it straight through an anomaly and into the future - leaving Abby and the team with little choice but to launch a perilous mission to save him. Hannah Spearritt stars

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Abby and Sarah race to save a civilian who is trapped in a tent when an anomaly opens at a campsite and releases a herd of embolotherium - rhinoceros-type beasts from the Eocene. Danny arrives with a mysterious woman from the future who seems to have the power to stop the stampede, but the team discovers she has a dark secret. Jason Flemyng, Hannah Spearritt and Laila Rouass star

programme.desc: The gang races to save one of its own, but is hindered by unseen forces. Western drama, starring Melanie Scrofano

The medical examiner reports that there were drugs in the victims system, while Stevens is unsure that the death was actually a homicide. Guest starring Michael B Jordan (Friday Night Lights) and Ralph Macchio (The Karate Kid)

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie teams up with Eva to hunt for a killer after a shocking daytime stabbing in a New York City park, and after another murder they realise the suspect has a hit-list

programme.title: Law and Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A psychiatrist is found murdered, leading Goren and Eames to suspect an ophthalmologist may be involved, especially when they realise that his research into schizophrenia could be masking mental health problems of his own. Crime drama, starring Vincent DOnofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: The Force: Manchester
programme.desc: Fast-paced documentary following the work of Greater Manchester Police, Englands second-largest force which is responsible for protecting 2.7 million people

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: The lifeguards take part in the annual challenge, amid massive swell and unpredictable weather

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A swimmers quick dip results in a possible spinal injury, while the lifeguards bid farewell to a much-loved member of the squad

programme.title: Customs UK

At Gatwick, a suspected heroin smuggler is subjected to an intimate search. Narrated by Jon Rand

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Londons Metropolitan Police dog unit tests the skills of its leading specialist search dogs, pitting spaniels Diesel and Billy against each other as they hunt for hidden heroin. On the streets of north London, shift leader Pete Madden puts his Alsatian Brodie in the line of fire when they target two armed robbers, but as the trail runs cold they find themselves in pursuit of a gang of car vandals. Ken Stott narrates

Attention then turns to a 16-year-old youth who has suffered a major head injury after falling from his bike, and in Darlington, Co Durham, a man needs to be extracted from his car following a collision. There is also some confusion over an accident said to have involved a wooden post

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Colin Stafford-Johnson continues to transform his childhood garden into a haven for wildlife. Rain finally arrives and the garden is transformed - ponds burst with dragonflies and damselflies, meadows explode in flower and the much-awaited hum of life can be heard everywhere. Colin Stafford-Johnson encounters his first nest of the year, a real milestone for the project and he explores the life cycle of the much overlooked solitary bees

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: The team heads to Dartmoor to find out how shepherds took advantage of the landscape to boost their income, taking their flocks there for summer grazing. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn get to grips with shearing, while Ruth Goodman visits a wool mill to learn how the fleeces were processed and manufactured. Land agent Rupert Acton and his family join the trio for a picnic, before using historic maps to follow an authentic Edwardian hiking trail

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Fine art dealer Gavin Claxton, market trader Gary Barton and aeronautical engineer and part-time upcycler Stu Abbott head to Durham to find some bargains they can turn into some flipping profit. programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Originally from India, Bindu grew up with a garden full of vegetables, nature and birdsong and would like to recreate a bit of that in her modest garden in Warrington, Cheshire. The garden is a sun trap, so she and partner Vivek want some height and shade in the plot as well as raised beds for fruit and veg growing. Its very important to them that they try and care for the environment too so would like the means to harvest rainwater and compost waste. With a relatively small budget of £3,000, Charlie Dimmock and Lee Hull create a garden that is both eco-friendly and looks beautiful

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: It is July and Alex Langlands, Peter Ginn and Ruth Goodman face their busiest period of the year as harvest arrives. The team brings in the cherries with the help of the Dartmoor pony, Ruth tries her hand at salmon netting, and Alex and Peter struggle to save their potato crop from being wiped out by plant disease. There is also time to relax after all the hard work with a day out at the seaside, featuring musical entertainment, new-fangled swimming costumes and a Punch and Judy show

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: It is July and Alex Langlands, Peter Ginn and Ruth Goodman face their busiest period of the year as harvest arrives. The team brings in the cherries with the help of the Dartmoor pony, Ruth tries her hand at salmon netting, and Alex and Peter struggle to save their potato crop from being wiped out by plant disease. There is also time to relax after all the hard work with a day out at the seaside, featuring musical entertainment, new-fangled swimming costumes and a Punch and Judy show

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Angus wants a garden that reminds him of his favourite holiday destination, Cyprus. Currently he hates his awkward shaped plot and absolutely loathes the domineering dark grey retaining wall, which he thinks makes the space look like a prison yard. Angus loves to barbeque and entertain friends so would like a generous Cypriot-inspired space in which to do that and is also keen to try to grow his own produce. Lee Burkhill and Flo Headlam head to Southampton to address his needs on a budget of £6,000

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Constant rain threatens the harvesting of the oat crop so Peter Ginn tries to fashion a weather vane in the hope of predicting future conditions, before the team deploys the latest in farming technology, including a tractor and an Edwardian film crew captures progress. The town enjoys a grand fete where new innovations of the era such as the electric lightbulb, the petrol-powered Lister engine and a genuine flying machine are showcased

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Colin Stafford-Johnson cuts his wildflower meadow. With the flowering season coming to an end it is time to remove his first-year growth to make room for the native plants that lie waiting in the soil beneath. Working through the winter Colin reflects on his journey so far and plans the busy spring and summer months ahead

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for the neon sign of a Soho sex shop and a piece of the wedding cake of William and Catherine, the Prince and Princess of Wales. Plus, one of only five remaining copies of Henry Becks redesign of the London Tube map dating back to the 1930s

programme.title: Futtocks End (1970)
programme.desc: A general invites a motley group of guests to stay at his country estate - and chaos ensues. Silent comedy. starring Ronnie Barker, Michael Hordern and Roger Livesey

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave is in Hastings, demonstrating how to prepare a new breeze-block extension for weather-proofing

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: DIY expert Dave Wellman is in West Midlands, using reclaimed bricks during a masterclass in old English brickwork

programme.title: Supermarket Secrets Revealed

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Colin Stafford-Johnsons garden is now bursting with life, and with red squirrels a regular visitor to the tree tops, he spots signs of another, even more elusive, mammal. programme.title: Come Play With Me (1977)
programme.desc: A nurse at a health farm takes over running the establishment, and comes up with her own range of sexual treatments. Meanwhile, two forgers on the run hide out at the farm. Sex comedy, starring Mary Millington, Alfie Bass and Irene Handl

programme.title: House of Whipcord (1974)
programme.desc: A French model befriends a strange man at a party and agrees to come home to meet his parents. She soon finds herself trapped in a disused prison taken over by a puritanical elderly couple, who seek to punish women whom they judge as immoral. Horror, starring Penny Irving, Barbara Markham, Patrick Barr and Ray Brooks

programme.desc: A man and woman continue to live with each other 18 years after their divorce; when they finally part, the woman wants everything they shared.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Marthas romantic weekend on a remote island is cut short when the hotel owner is stabbed to death in his room in what appears to be an attempted robbery. But since the flower beds outside the window are undisturbed, Humphrey is certain that one of the victims associates played a part in his death. Theres just one problem - since the DI had a direct view of the only staircase leading up to the room, he is the alibi for all the suspects. Meanwhile, JP worries about his marriage and seeks relationship advice from Dwayne

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When housekeeper Janice Higgins races into St Marys asking for help, Father Brown is only too happy to oblige. Janices employer, Bernard Ross believes that his daughter Louisa, who died a year previously, has become a vampire. Father Brown and Brenda visit Ross Manor only to find Gilbert Gallamore and vampire hunter Silas OHagan whipping Bernard into a frenzy - much to the disapproval of Bernards sister-in-law. Tensions are high between the group at dinner that evening and the next morning Gilbert is found dead, with bite marks on his neck. Josie Lawrence guest stars, with Mark Williams

programme.desc: A woman is found smothered to death in a vineyard - and although suspicion initially falls on her drug-dealer boyfriend, Jane pursues a separate line of enquiry based on the colour of the victims hair. programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part one of two. A man is found murdered on his boat five miles out at sea, with no possible way a killer could have escaped. At first Humphrey turns his attention to the small group he was with the night before he died - but as the investigation deepens, the investigation takes an unexpected turn that requires the team to leave the comfort of their Caribbean island - and go searching for their suspects in London. Kris Marshall stars
